entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used in the intercropping study

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used in the intercropping study

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing pearl millet and groundnut together in a specific row arrangement

entities.name: SOLE CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing pearl millet or groundnut separately

entities.name: YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The amount of yield produced by a single plant

entities.name: DRY MATTER ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The buildup of organic matter in the plant

entities.name: LEAF AREA DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth and expansion of leaf surface area

entities.name: TILLER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The number of tillers produced by the plant

entities.name: SEED YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per plant

entities.name: HEADS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of seed heads per plant

entities.name: SEEDS PER HEAD
entities.description: The number of seeds per head

entities.name: LAND EQUIVALENT RATIO
entities.description: A measure used to compare the efficiency of intercropping versus sole cropping

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: The total mass of dry organic material produced

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE YIELD
entities.description: The yield derived from the reproductive parts of the plant

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the combined intercrop canopy surface area

entities.name: TOTAL ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The combined length of the rooting system in the intercrop

entities.name: LIGHT ENERGY CONVERSION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of converting intercepted light energy into dry matter

entities.name: LIGHT ENERGY INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The amount of light energy captured by the crop canopy

entities.name: WATER USE
entities.description: The total amount of water consumed by the crops

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of water used by the crop relative to total water loss

entities.name: EVAPORATION
entities.description: The loss of water from the soil surface

entities.name: NUTRIENT UPTAKE
entities.description: The absorption of essential nutrients by the plants

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: An essential nutrient (N) absorbed by the crops

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: An essential nutrient (P) absorbed by the crops

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: An essential nutrient (K) absorbed by the crops

relationships.description: similar to sole cropping in groundnut
increased by higher heads per plant
increased by higher seeds per head
used to measure increase in total dry matter
used to measure increase in reproductive yield
used to measure increase in leaf area index
used to measure increase in total root length
increased efficiency in converting light energy into dry matter
no increase in amount of light energy intercepted
improved by reducing soil surface evaporation
associated with greater uptake of nutrients
